test_traj.command:
cat <<'EOF' > test_alive.ll
; Test for alive-tv to check ValueTracking
define i32 @test_phi_select_recursive(i32 %x, i1 %cond) {
entry:
  br i1 %cond, label %true, label %false

true:
  br label %merge

false:
  br label %merge

merge:
  %phi = phi i32 [ %x, %true ], [ %sel, %false ]
  %sel = select i1 %cond, i32 %phi, i32 42
  ret i32 %sel
}

define i32 @test_phi_phi_recursive(i32 %x, i32 %y, i1 %cond1, i1 %cond2) {
entry:
  br i1 %cond1, label %bb1, label %bb2

bb1:
  br label %merge1

bb2:
  br label %merge1

merge1:
  %phi1 = phi i32 [ %x, %bb1 ], [ %phi2, %bb2 ]
  br i1 %cond2, label %bb3, label %bb4

bb3:
  br label %merge2

bb4:
  br label %merge2

merge2:
  %phi2 = phi i32 [ %y, %bb3 ], [ %phi1, %bb4 ]
  ret i32 %phi2
}
EOF
